case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SANTIAGO CATARINO PALACIOS MUNOZ

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-06-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SANTIAGO CATARINO PALACIOS MUNOZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED APR-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS MUNOZ, SANTIAGO CATARINO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SANTIAGO CATARINO PALACIOS MUNOZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS MUNOZ, SANTIAGO CATARINO
